title: Rustic Engineer
description: Using wood and metal to create all kinds of machines
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e46cc78450b9cea58e99b2ffc15ebf9907225c7c_0.webp)
Rustic Engineer is a mod based on mechanical constructions of all types, from transport machines and even accessories. Everything is very rustic and built only with wood and metals, maintaining the vanilla appearance.

Developing these mods takes time, dedication, and a lot of care — all because I love seeing you have fun with them.
If this mod helped you have some epic moments in the game, consider buying me a coffee ☕.
It keeps me motivated to keep creating, and you might even get some exclusive rewards.
Every little bit helps!![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b98ea373e8fab2df7e4a6c29c57d57209790587a_0.webp)

This mod is not complete, but there are already machines available to build and use.

How to make Iron plate.
place an iron ingot on the anvil and hit it with a rustic hammer.



<details>
<summary>Version 1.1.0 – Changelog</summary>

Items and Machines

Added descriptions to items.
Added descriptions to machines.
Applied new iron-based metallic textures to machines.
Retextured machine-related item icons.
Added a new model for the Airship.
Added a new logo for the creative menu.

Removed Content

Removed Solarite and all Solarium-related derivatives.
Removed the Hydraulic Press.
Removed the Pipe Wrench.
All recipes that previously used Solarite now use iron instead.

New Items

Added the Rustic Hammer: (Used to craft Iron Plates.)
Also functions as a weapon with stats equivalent to an iron axe.
Added the Wooden Box: (Used to collect and transport machines.)

Machines

Machines now drop all items from their inventory when destroyed or collected.

</details>

**Geckolib required</br>
JEI required (to see the recipes)**
